urdu transliteration text:
Ye hamaari qismat hai,
Hum Hussain (A.S) Waale Hain
Hum Hussain Waale Hain,
Hum Hussain Waale Hain
english translation text:
This is our destiny,
we are the followers of Hussain
We are the followers of Hussain,
We are the followers of Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Hum se Faatema Zehra (A.S),
kar chuki hai ek waada
Ab hamaari jannat hai
english translation text:
Fatema Zahra has made us a promise
Paradise belongs to us
(for our love of Hussain)

urdu transliteration text:
Hum Hussain Waale Hain,
Hum Hussain Waale Hain
english translation text:

We are the followers of Hussain

urdu transliteration text:

Har zamana mere hussain ka hai
Every era belongs to my Hussain
english translation text: My Hussain's right, we have to fulfill

urdu transliteration text:

That's the grandfather of my Hussain (Holy Prophet)
english translation text: For whose sake, this universe has been created
